hero.heading:
Resists all
categories that came before it.
hero.body:
Not a bag, not a tote, not a case — something else entirely.
Precision leather craft resolved into every panel, every pocket, placed with reason.
Designed for those who are attuned and move with purpose.

brandStatement.heading: The First in its story.
brandStatement.body:
The Tarrant resists the categories that came before it. Not a bag, not a tote, not a case — something else entirely.
Precision leather craft resolved into every panel, every pocket, placed with reason. Designed for those who are attuned and move with purpose.

items.title: Top Grain Leather
items.body: Hand-stitched on 3 colourways. Traditional material, modern precision.

items.title: Molded Pockets
items.body: A precision-engineered carry system. Each compartment shaped for a specific object. Not just stitched leather.

items.title: Dual Purpose
items.body: Carry organiser. Work surface. One object, two modes. Flips over to become a flat, considered workspace.

items.title: D-Ring Hardware
items.body: Carry strap attachment for on-the-move use. Confirms this travels — from desk to meeting to city.

items.title: Slim Profile
items.body: Architectural lines. Looks like it holds nothing but holds everything. The opposite of bulk.

items.title: Holds Everything
items.body: Laptop, stylus, phone, AirPods, charger, keys, glasses. One pocket system. Zero compromises.

craftsmanshipPreview.heading:
The making is
the meaning.
craftsmanshipPreview.body: Each Tarrant begins as flat hides selected for grain quality and consistency. The leather is cut, then the five distinct leather forms are arranged in a single system. Architecture does not decorate. It proposes. The best objects work by the same logic.
